2008.issue: [S2008] Version 1.0.5 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3019.issue: [W3019] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1" has "npm-token" parameter specified. Trusted publishing will not work while "npm-token" is set.

3027.issue: [W3027] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": testing for OS windows, macos is missing in job "adapter-tests". Add corresponding tests to "test-and-release.yml" or adapt [package.json](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.ikettle2/blob/master/package.json) "os" accordingly.

3032.issue: [W3032] Workflow "test-and-release.yml" run triggered by tag "v1.0.5" for current release 1.0.5 failed [run #872](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.ikettle2/actions/runs/25268528442).

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5604.issue: [W5604] i18n "admin/i18n" language "zh-cn" is missing 1 key(s) present in English: ip

8005.issue: [W8005] Latest GitHub release tag (v1.0.4) does not match latest npm version (1.0.5).

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("npm", "github-actions") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8908.issue: [S8908] Dependabot entry for "npm" has "open-pull-requests-limit: 5". A limit of at least 15 is recommended.

0036.issue: [E0036] @alcalzone/release-script-plugin-manual-review 5.1.1 specified. 5.2.0 is required as minimum,  5.2.0 (or newer) is current. Please update devDependencies at [package.json](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.ikettle2/blob/master/package.json)

0088.issue: [S0088] "/tsconfig.json" should contain an extends clause like "extends": "@tsconfig/node20/tsconfig.json" (see ioBroker.examples).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.ikettle2/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
